summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 candidate PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Open non-security PRs are kept independently for maintainer review or author follow-up; already-closed PRs receive no close action; security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling only.

actions.reason: Useful narrow work remains, but it is not a duplicate/superseded cleanup target and cannot be merged in this plan-mode, no-merge job.
The PR is broad and not merge-ready, but it carries unique TaskFlow work and should not be closed as duplicate or low-signal under this job.
Security-sensitive routing is scoped to this exact PR; no close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned.
